title: Nest Building Test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"91m0d","text":"Used to assess nigrostriatal sensorimotor function in mice. Based on the Deacon 2006 protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place a paper tissue folded into a 5x5 cm square.
Singly house mice in individual, clean cages.

Following 48h the bedding was score between 0 to 5 as follows: 0- The mice did not touch the paper square. 1- The mice unfolded the paper square but did not tear it up. 2- The mice unfolded and started to tear down <10% of the paper square. 3- The mice tear down the paper square <50%. 4- The mice tear down the paper square, but the bedding is not perfect. 5- Perfect bedding.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
